channel.title: Cms on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Cms on cron.umbe.me

item.title: Architettura Event-Driven in Pimcore: CQRS e Event Sourcing
item.description: Guida completa per implementare un’architettura Event-Driven in Pimcore usando CQRS e Event Sourcing. Ottieni 50.000+ operazioni/ora con latenza sotto 100ms per le letture.

item.title: Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore: CQRS & Event Sourcing
item.description: Learn how to implement Event-Driven Architecture in Pimcore using CQRS and Event Sourcing patterns for handling millions of DataObjects. Battle-tested patterns from production systems achieving sub-second API response times with 50M+ records.
